• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps and real-time networking.
  • Features include vehicle upgrades, inventory management, chat system, and admin controls.
  • Uses MQTT for multiplayer networking and IndexedDB for local save management.
  • Implements mobile controls with touch-friendly interface and responsive design.
  • Includes sound engine with music, SFX, and engine rumble effects.
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9 };
    const GameEngine = class { constructor() { this.localPlayer = { id: uuid(), gridX: 0, gridY: 0 }; } };

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game featuring procedurally generated maps, real-time networking via MQTT, and comprehensive upgrade systems. Players can mine resources, build structures, and interact with others in shared worlds while managing fuel, hull integrity, and inventory. The game includes mobile controls, admin features, and persistent save systems using IndexedDB and cloud storage.
